nodes.body: Ran into a bit of a pickle here: we still need an unpaginated version of the endpoint to get all AI Gateway endpoints (this is used in the workspaces tab to list available endpoints). So, we need a way to ignore the default limit of 10 if limit isn't passed in. I decided to just override the default instead of having 2 different endpoints (1 paginated and 1 unpaginated). Open to other opinions
Overriding seems to be a reasonable option for now. Do we know if we also want a paginated view in the UI (in workspaces)?
I don't think so- for the datasources tab we don't have a paginated view so I think it makes sense to follow that pattern
nit: might want to just create a val for limit and avoid repetition
